sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104774" key="triakonta/xronos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐᾱκοντά-χρονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τριακοντάσημος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.311</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
